## Validation

## Scope Checklist

- [ ] No secrets included (`.env.local` not committed)
- [ ] No local media assets committed (screenshots/recordings/reference files)
- [ ] `TASK_PLAN.md`, `FINDINGS.md`, `PROGRESS.md` updated by milestone if applicable
